summary: Iteration 1 scoped as a pure UI/UX Redesign pass: bring 15 existing Flutter screens into visual alignment with rideglory.pen design. No new features, no backend changes, no new domain models. 11 user stories (US-1-1 through US-1-11) covering gap analysis, 9 screen modules, and a QA gate story. 10 tasks defined. Implementation split into 5 module-scoped PRs (max 40 files each). Auth frames gate and donut chart scope are pre-flight items for design agent. ManageAttendeesPage explicitly deferred to iter-2 as Story 2.9.
qualityGates: 11 user stories written (US-1-1 through US-1-11) — all reference rideglory.pen frame IDs from REQUIREMENTS.md Appendix A
At least 2 QA tasks defined (T-1-8 dart analyze baseline, T-1-9 full quality gate with 5 manual smoke tests)
Scope boundaries documented: no backend changes, no domain models, no new routes
Assumptions and open questions captured (auth frames gate, donut chart scope, AI cover smoke test)
Next-agent guidance written for architect, design, frontend, qa, tech_lead
workflow/state.json: agents.po.status set to idle, tasks[] populated with T-1-1 through T-1-10, events[] has po_plan and phase_complete entries
docs/handoffs/iteration_checkpoint.md updated: po_scope marked done, Next = architect
